# yba_provider_image_bundles (Data Source)

List all image bundles for a provider. Optionally filter by architecture, name, or default status.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `provider_id` (String) UUID of the provider.

### Optional

- `arch` (String) Filter by architecture. Allowed values: x86_64, aarch64.
- `default_only` (Boolean) If true, return only the default image bundle.
- `name` (String) Filter by name. Matches image bundles whose name contains this string (case-insensitive).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `image_bundles` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--image_bundles))

<a id="nestedatt--image_bundles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `image_bundles`

Read-Only:

- `arch` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `use_as_default` (Boolean)
- `uuid` (String)
